title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 15–18, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: IT DIDN'T LOOK THAT WAY TO ME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THINGS ARE FINALLY GONNA GET FUN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: DON'T WORRY, I LIKE THAT OLD MAN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I won't let him get killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HOW CAN YOU JUST STAND THERE LAUGHING? WHAT DO YOU GET OUT OF THIS ANYWAY?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll steal that map back, and then we can go there together!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: YOU WANT THE MAP AND ALL THAT TREASURE, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WORK TOGETHER FOR A COMMON GOAL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'M MORE WORRIED ABOUT MY REPUTATION THAN MY GUTS, RIGHT NOW. I'VE GOT A SCORE TO SETTLE!

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
